textbook: 人教版 PEP 英语五年级下册

unit_test.title: Unit 6 Work quietly! 单元水平测试

questions.question: “Keep your desk clean”的意思是“保持桌面整洁”。
questions.explanation: Keep clean意为保持整洁，your desk意为你的课桌。

questions.question: 在图书馆我们要“Talk loudly”。
questions.explanation: 在图书馆应保持安静，应为Talk quietly。

questions.question: “Is he drinking water?”是一个正确的现在进行时疑问句。
questions.explanation: 现在进行时疑问句结构为：Is/Are + 主语 + 动词ing形式。

questions.question: “Take turns”的意思是“各走各的”。
questions.explanation: Take turns的意思是“轮流”。

questions.question: “Keep to the right”的意思是“靠右行”。
questions.explanation: Keep to the right是常用的交通规则或行为准则，指靠右。

questions.knowledge_point: 现在进行时一般疑问句
questions.question: — Are they eating lunch? — ________
questions.explanation: 含有are的疑问句，肯定回答用Yes, 主语 + are.

questions.question: Look! The panda is ________ bamboo.
questions.explanation: Look是现在进行时的标志词，需用be + 动词ing。

questions.question: Shh! Keep ________. The baby is sleeping.
questions.explanation: Keep + 形容词表示保持某种状态，keep quiet表示保持安静。

questions.question: Is ________ listening to music?
questions.explanation: 系动词是Is，主语应为单数第三人称。

questions.question: Which word has a different sound for 'wh'?
questions.explanation: whose中wh发/h/音，其他三个单词中wh发/w/音。

questions.question: We should ________ turns when we play games.
questions.explanation: 情态动词should后接动词原形，take turns是固定搭配。

questions.question: Keep ________ the right when you walk upstairs.
questions.explanation: Keep to the right是固定用法，意为靠右行。

questions.question: What is Tom ________ now?
questions.explanation: What is ... doing? 询问正在做什么。

questions.question: — Is she reading a book? — ________. She is drawing.
questions.explanation: 根据后一句She is drawing可知，前一句是否定回答。

questions.knowledge_point: 名词性物主代词与进行时结合
questions.question: The books are ________. They are reading at the table.
questions.explanation: 此处需要名词性物主代词作表语，theirs意为“他们的书”。

questions.question: Are you ________ (listen) to music?
questions.explanation: be动词are引导的进行时，listen需变现在分词形式。

questions.question: Please talk ________ in the library.
questions.explanation: library提示要安静，talk quietly意为小声说话。

questions.question: Work ________! Don't make any noise.
questions.explanation: Work quietly是本单元核心短语，意为安静。

questions.question: Is ________ (he) washing his clothes?
questions.explanation: 句子缺主语，且be动词是is，故填he。

questions.question: 请将下列英语短语与对应的中文意思匹配。
questions.explanation: keep clean-保持整洁；take turns-轮流；keep quiet-保持安静；show me-给我看看。

questions.question: 将动词原形与-ing形式匹配。
questions.explanation: 此题考查单词对应关系，dance对应dancing，read对应阅读，running对应run。

questions.question: 将下列单词连成句子：
questions.explanation: 祈使句。保持你的桌面整洁。

questions.knowledge_point: 现在进行时一般疑问句
questions.question: 将下列单词连成句子：
questions.explanation: 疑问句。他们正在一起玩吗？

exam.title: 五年级下册 Unit 6 阶段收官水平测试

questions.question: “writing”是“write”的正确ing形式。
questions.explanation: 以不发音e结尾的单词，去e再加ing。

questions.question: 单词“who”中的“wh”发和“what”中一样的音。
questions.explanation: who中wh发/h/，what中wh发/w/。

questions.question: “Don't food here”是一个正确的英文句子。
questions.explanation: Don't后面应接动词，应为Don't eat here。

questions.question: “They are listen to the teacher.”语法完全正确。
questions.explanation: are后接动词应使用ing形式，应为listening。

questions.question: “Talk quietly”意味着“小声说话”。
questions.explanation: talk意思是说，quietly意思是小声地、安静地。

questions.question: Someone is sleeping. You should say: ________
questions.explanation: 有人睡觉时，应提醒他人小声说话。

questions.question: — Are ________ drawing? — Yes, we are.
questions.explanation: 由回答we are可知，问句对应的是you（多指你们）。

questions.question: Can you ________? Yes, I am ________ now.
questions.explanation: Can后接原形，am后接ing形式。

questions.question: — ________ is she? — She is in the library.
questions.explanation: 根据回答地点可知用Where提问。

questions.question: When we wait in line, we should ________.
questions.explanation: 排队等候时应该轮流/按序。

questions.question: Which word has the same sound as 'white'?
questions.explanation: white和whale的wh都发/w/音。

questions.question: “Keep to the right” translates to ________.
questions.explanation: right是右边的意思。

questions.question: The students ________ hard in the classroom.
questions.explanation: 主语students是复数，用are + ing。

questions.question: ________ any noise here.
questions.explanation: 否定祈使句结构：Don't + 动词原形。

questions.question: — Whose book is it? — It's ________. She ________ it.
questions.explanation: 名词性物主代词hers作表语，后半句描述正在进行的动作。

questions.question: The boy is ________ (run) on the playground.
questions.explanation: run是重读闭音节单词，双写末尾字母加ing。

questions.question: They are talking in ________ library.
questions.explanation: 在图书馆固定搭配是in the library。

questions.question: Please keep your room ________.
questions.explanation: keep clean意为保持整洁。

questions.question: What ________ you doing?
questions.explanation: 主格you对应的be动词为are。

questions.question: 将下列指令与其场景匹配。
questions.explanation: 指令与含义的直接匹配。

questions.question: 将问句与答语匹配。
questions.explanation: 考查现在进行时的问答逻辑。

questions.question: 将单词排成句子：
questions.explanation: 祈使句，提示在图书馆保持安静。

questions.question: 将单词排成句子：
questions.explanation: listen to music的现在进行时一般疑问句形式。

knowledge_summary.point: 现在进行时一般疑问句
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 用来确认某人是否正在进行某项活动。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Be (Am/Is/Are) + 主语 + 动词-ing + 其他?
common_mistakes: 回答时be动词和主语不一致，如：Are you...? Yes, I am. 错写成 Yes, I are.
knowledge_summary.tips: 回答时注意‘人称对调’，问you答I/we，问he/she/they则原样回。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 在特定公共场所使用的文明礼貌用语和行为约束。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 动词原形 + 其他 (如：Keep clean / Talk quietly)
common_mistakes: 形容词和副词混淆，如把talk quietly写成talk quiet。
knowledge_summary.tips: 祈使句开头通常省略主语you，表示命令或建议。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: wh在w和h两种音中的切换规律。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: wh + O 常见发 /h/ (如who); wh + 其他元音多发 /w/ (如what)。
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住特例：who, whose, whom, whole里的wh都发/h/。
